title: Blend 001199 with 001193 n_ens32 RealMLP
summary: Add a small amount of the n_ens32 two-seed RealMLP variant to 001199.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Recreate the 001193 concept as a two-seed RealMLP core with n_ens=32 where applicable. Set final predictions to 0.85 * pred_001199 + 0.15 * pred_001193. Keep CatBoost handling from 001199 unchanged.
expected_effect: Combine the best CatBoost correction with a stronger variance-reduced neural core.
risk: n_ens32 may improve CV but not public, so the blend can overfit local validation.
